caption: A group of men in formal attire, primarily wearing suits and ties or traditional Indian jackets, are seen walking together outdoors in a daylight setting. Among them is a man in a dark suit and tie who appears to be speaking while others walk alongside him. The scene shifts slightly across the frames as the group moves forward, with different men coming into focus. A red news ticker at the bottom of every frame displays the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है" alongside the time "10:01 PM" and a small logo that reads "MAHADEV". The top of the frames features a red banner with the text "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo, including the website "news18india.com". The overall composition shows a political gathering or official movement being captured by a news broadcast.
